title: leiandra divaricata
intro: Leiandra divaricata is a flowering plant species in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of these conditions. In herbal preparations, Leiandra divaricata is often used as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves can also be used to make a tea or tincture.
